title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
bookSummary: A desert planet, a noble family in danger, and a young heir pulled into politics, prophecy, and survival.
movieSummary: Denis Villeneuve's adaptation follows Paul Atreides as House Atreides takes stewardship of Arrakis.
quotes: The mystery of life isn't a problem to solve, but a reality to experience.
shirtIdeas: Minimal sandworm silhouette wrapping around the phrase Desert State of Mind.
Arrakis travel-poster design with twin moons and spice-toned lettering.

title: The Princess Bride
author: William Goldman
bookSummary: A playful adventure of true love, swordplay, revenge, giants, and wonderfully theatrical danger.
movieSummary: A beloved fairy-tale comedy that turns quests, villains, and romance into endlessly quotable fun.
shirtIdeas: Vintage quest-map graphic with As You Wish stitched like a travel badge.
Sword-and-rose crest for a playful fairy-tale adventure tee.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
bookSummary: Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy spar through pride, class, family pressure, and slowly earned affection.
movieSummary: A sweeping adaptation centered on glances, misunderstandings, and emotional restraint breaking open.
quotes: Till this moment I never knew myself.
shirtIdeas: Regency-style letterpress: I Dearly Love a Laugh with tiny teacup and book icons.
Elegant ballroom typography with a tiny handwritten Pemberley note.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
bookSummary: A marriage becomes a media spectacle after a disappearance reveals layers of manipulation and resentment.
movieSummary: David Fincher's cool, tense adaptation turns the missing-person story into a sharp psychological trap.
quotes: There is a difference between really loving someone and loving the idea of her.
Sleep is like a cat: It only comes to you if you ignore it.
shirtIdeas: Noir evidence-board layout reading Plot Twist Department.
Minimal missing-poster design with sharp thriller typography.

title: Charlotte's Web
author: E. B. White
bookSummary: A gentle story about friendship, courage, farm life, and the words that can save someone.
movieSummary: A warm family adaptation that keeps the farmyard friendship at the heart of the story.
quotes: It is not often that someone comes along who is a true friend and a good writer.
With the right words, you can change the world.
shirtIdeas: Soft storybook web lettering spelling Some Friend across a pocket tee.
Farmyard badge design with gentle hand-drawn type.

title: Little Women
author: Louisa May Alcott
bookSummary: Four sisters grow through art, ambition, love, loss, and the daily work of becoming themselves.
movieSummary: Greta Gerwig's adaptation braids memory and adulthood into a lively portrait of the March sisters.
quotes: I am not afraid of storms, for I am learning how to sail my ship.
I like good strong words that mean something.
shirtIdeas: Ink-and-thread design: Good Strong Words with four small book spines.
Sisterhood literary-club crest with warm vintage typography.
